default_dimensions.name: source-grounded
default_dimensions.description: Claims cite real, verifiable sources found via search in the current session. No training-data assertions presented as fact. Studies verified via Crossref where applicable. Named researchers, specific data, not 'studies show'.

default_dimensions.name: confidence-calibration
default_dimensions.description: Every substantive claim has a confidence label. Labels are well-calibrated — not inflated, not deflated. Unverified claims capped at 2 stars. Contested claims capped at 3 stars. Triangulation rule enforced (3+ sources for 'established').

default_dimensions.name: actionable
default_dimensions.description: Reader can take specific action based on findings. 'So what?' test passes for every major section. Tactics are concrete enough to execute, not abstract advice.

default_dimensions.name: intellectual-honesty
default_dimensions.description: Uncertainty stated plainly. Counter-evidence actively sought and presented. Missing evidence distinguished from negative evidence. Contrarian views steelmanned. No false precision.

default_dimensions.name: structure-compliance
default_dimensions.description: Output follows the correct template for the mode (deep, quick, sources, etc.). All required sections present. Source log formatted correctly. Saved to correct path with correct suffix.

default_dimensions.name: search-thoroughness
default_dimensions.description: Meets minimum search depth for the mode (8+ for deep, 5+ for quick). Uses 3+ different search channels. Academic sources checked. Counter-evidence searched. Stopping rules respected.

default_dimensions.name: concise
default_dimensions.description: Dense with insight, light on filler. Every section earns its place. No padding sentences. Within target length for the mode.

deep.name: layer-completeness
deep.description: All 5 analysis layers present and substantive: Foundations, Evidence Landscape, Practical Tactics, Contrarian Views, Decision Translation. Self-audit addresses all 8 checks.

contrarian.name: steelman-quality
contrarian.description: Contrarian positions presented in their strongest form. Not strawmanned, not dismissed. Five dimensions addressed: replication, practitioner-academic gap, emerging evidence, structural critiques, credible outliers.

harvest.name: tag-coverage
harvest.description: At least 2 elements per tag type (STAT, QUOTE, FRAMEWORK, STORY, CONTRARIAN, TACTIC). Multi-tag elements identified. Gaps noted with diagnosis.

harvest.name: content-potential
harvest.description: Hooks are compelling and platform-appropriate. Format recommendations are justified. Prioritization is sensible (surprising > confirming, emotional > abstract).

tactics.name: executability
tactics.description: Tactics are specific enough to execute without further research. Include when/how/why, not just what. Difficulty and impact labeled.

scoring.fail: Any dimension < 5, or 3+ dimensions below min_score
